feedback.markdownBody:
VERIFICATION FAILED for PAN-1148 (attempt 1/10):

Failed check: vbrief-ac

Acceptance criteria check FAILED — 141/175 AC incomplete:

### Add fractal-noise body overlay + shared top-bar styles for new chrome (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Fractal-noise overlay renders fixed-position at 3.5% opacity, 256px tile; does not capture pointer events
  - [ ] TopBar primitive supports {height, breadcrumb, meta, search, segmentedControl, actions} slots per PRD §4.7.2
  - [ ] Primary button uses --primary background with inset white 6% highlight; ghost button uses transparent + --input border

### Add Issue Detail drawer shell + global store slice (single-instance, URL-addressable) (9/9 incomplete)
  - [ ] IssueDrawer.tsx implements PRD §4.7.8 surface spec: 980px max-width, max-width: calc(100vw - 48px), full-height pinned right, backdrop-filter blur(2px), shadow -24px 0 64px rgb(0 0 0 / 40%)
  - [ ] Zustand store has new `drawer` slice with `{ issueId: string | null, tab: string }` and actions `openIssue(id, tab?)`, `closeIssue()`; opening a new issue while one is open REPLACES (not stacks)
  - [ ] URL sync: opening sets `?issue=<id>&tab=<tab>` via history.replaceState; closing removes both params; initial page load with `?issue=<id>` opens drawer on mount
  - [ ] Esc, X button, and click-on-scrim all dispatch closeIssue()
  - [ ] Parent surface receives a `data-drawer-open="true"` attribute and applies 4% accent overlay + 2px blur via CSS — no inline style mutation
  - [ ] Animation: drawer slide-in 200ms ease-in-out (scale 0.98 → 1, opacity 0 → 1) per PRD §4.7.11
  - [ ] Vitest integration test asserts the single-instance invariant: openIssue('A'), openIssue('B'), then store reads { issueId: 'B' } (not stacked)
  - [ ] Vitest integration test for rapid open→close→open burst (50 iterations) confirms no orphan listeners or subscriptions in the store
  - [ ] Closing the drawer restores parent surface scroll position (drawer is overlay, not navigation)

### Define and implement drawer subscription contract (Effect-managed, server-filtered by issueId) (6/6 incomplete)
  - [ ] WS-RPC contract gains `subscribeIssueEvents(issueId)` server-filtered stream in src/dashboard/server/ws-rpc.ts
  - [ ] useDrawerData hook returns `{ issue, agents, beads, reviewSpecialists, verificationGates, activityRail }` as reactive selectors keyed off the open issue id
  - [ ] Subscription is initiated on drawer open, torn down on drawer close (verified by network panel inspection / vitest with WS mock)
  - [ ] All drawer subsection components (active agent, beads, specialists, side rail) consume useDrawerData ONLY — no direct fetches or per-section subscriptions
  - [ ] Server-side filter implemented in src/dashboard/server/ws-rpc.ts; client never receives events for other issues over this stream (vitest with mock server)
  - [ ] Re-opening the drawer for the same issue id within 1 second reuses the existing subscription (no spurious tear-down + re-subscribe)

### Add drawer Phase Timeline component (6-step header strip) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Renders all 6 steps with correct top-accent colors per state (done/current/upcoming)
  - [ ] Reads phase data from useDrawerData (not its own fetch)
  - [ ] when-stamps render in muted, except current step which goes foreground weight 500

### Add drawer Tabs component (Overview / Plan / Beads / Conversation / Terminal / Activity / Files) (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Tabs render with correct active/hover/muted styling per PRD §4.7.8
  - [ ] Active tab syncs to `?tab=<tab>` URL parameter via drawer store action
  - [ ] Count chips on tabs with collections (Beads N/M) read counts from useDrawerData
  - [ ] Initial tab on drawer open is `overview` unless `?tab=` specifies otherwise

### Add drawer Active Agent card (in-drawer agent panel with stream + Tell input) (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Renders agent name (SF Mono 13px), verb badge (9px small variant), right-aligned meta (model · runtime · spend)
  - [ ] Stream excerpt panel implements PRD §4.7.8 spec: rgb(0 0 0 / 32%) bg, border, 11px SF Mono, 180px max-height scroll
  - [ ] Tell input + Send button POST to /api/agents/:id/tell on submit; UI clears after success
  - [ ] Empty state (no active agent) renders muted placeholder without errors

### Add drawer Verification Gates grid (typecheck / lint / test / UAT) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Renders 4 gates: typecheck, lint, test, UAT in a 4-column grid
  - [ ] Pass / fail border colors match PRD §4.7.8 color-mix tokens
  - [ ] Reads gate state from useDrawerData; updates reactively when gate results change

### Add drawer Beads List (closed list with mono IDs, durations, done/current animation) (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Renders beads list with correct done/current visual states per PRD §4.7.8
  - [ ] Current bead has animated ping ring (scale 1 → 1.5, opacity 1 → 0)
  - [ ] Done bead titles render with text-decoration: line-through at 18% white
  - [ ] Reads beads from useDrawerData (not a separate fetch)

### Add drawer Review Specialists list (4 verdict rows) (2/2 incomplete)
  - [ ] Renders 4 review specialist rows with correct status dot colors (run=info, idle=muted, done=success, fail=destructive)
  - [ ] Reads from useDrawerData; updates reactively as convoy specialists progress

### Add drawer Live Activity right rail (320px column with stream items) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Renders side rail at 320px width with correct border + background per PRD §4.7.8
  - [ ] Stream items render most-recent-first; auto-scrolls to top on new item arrival
  - [ ] Status dot colors match phase per PRD §4.7.8

### Add drawer Action Bar (Reset · Stop · View PR · Merge to main) (5/5 incomplete)
  - [ ] Action bar renders with PRD §4.7.8 layout and color spec (Ghost left, primary green Merge right)
  - [ ] Reset wires to /api/issues/:id/reset with confirmation dialog (reuse useConfirm from DialogProvider)
  - [ ] Stop agent wires to /api/agents/:id/stop with confirmation
  - [ ] Merge button disabled unless readyForMerge=true && mergeStatus!=merged; click POSTs to /api/issues/:id/merge
  - [ ] View PR opens issue.url or workspace.mrUrl in new tab when present, hidden when both absent

### Add Pipeline page shell + route (greenfield) (6/6 incomplete)
  - [ ] PipelineView.tsx renders at /pipeline route via App.tsx routing
  - [ ] Composes TopBar primitive at 52px height with title 'Pipeline'
  - [ ] Reads issues + reviewStatusByIssueId from existing Zustand store; no new endpoints
  - [ ] Phase classification uses src/dashboard/frontend/src/lib/pipeline-state.ts helpers (no duplicate logic)
  - [ ] Tab type in Header.tsx includes 'pipeline'; TAB_PATHS contains '/pipeline'; PATH_TO_TAB resolves '/pipeline' → 'pipeline'
  - [ ] Sidebar.tsx has a Pipeline nav entry above Board in the Operations group

### Wire Pipeline 5-tile metric strip (Active issues / Work running / Review running / Ship / Spend 24h) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] 5 tiles render in correct order with correct eyebrow icons and signal colors
  - [ ] Counts update reactively as store changes
  - [ ] Spend tile reuses the cost_events selector that powers Board today (no new endpoint)

### Wire Pipeline phase grouping with sticky PhaseHeader (Ship · Review · Work · Plan · Todo) (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Issues are correctly bucketed into Ship, Review, Work, Plan, Todo per pipeline-state.ts classifier
  - [ ] PhaseHeader sticks to top while scrolling within its group
  - [ ] Empty groups render their PhaseHeader with count '0' but do not show row area
  - [ ] Within each phase, rows sort by priority desc then updatedAt desc

### Wire Pipeline cross-project filter (?phase=ship segment, project pills, blocked/no-pr modifiers) (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Phase segmented control syncs to ?phase=<phase> URL parameter; clicking a segment scrolls to that PhaseHeader and filters
  - [ ] Project pill multi-select syncs to ?projects=<csv>
  - [ ] ?phase=ship + ?blocked covers the legacy Awaiting Merge blocked view (selectBlockedFromMerge)
  - [ ] ?phase=ship + ?noPr covers the legacy Awaiting Merge open-merge-requests view (selectOpenMergeRequests)

### Wire Pipeline IssueRow → Issue Detail drawer (click opens drawer) (2/2 incomplete)
  - [ ] Clicking any Pipeline row calls openIssue(row.issueId) which sets ?issue=<id> and renders the drawer
  - [ ] Closing the drawer leaves scroll position at the previously-clicked row

### Swap KanbanBoard card render to IssueCard primitive (preserves all surrounding kanban machinery) (6/6 incomplete)
  - [ ] KanbanBoard renders IssueCard for each item; no inline card markup remains
  - [ ] All existing KanbanBoard.test.tsx tests pass without modification (snapshot updates allowed only for the card slot)
  - [ ] Drag-to-reorder within a column still works (manual verification in browser noted in PR description)
  - [ ] BulkActionBar still receives selection events from cards (click-to-select still works)
  - [ ] Stuck cards and READY-TO-MERGE cards show correct border color overrides
  - [ ] If PR #1160 is NOT merged at start of this work (per H1), card inlines a reconciliation: when reviewStatus.readyForMerge but PR is closed-not-merged, treat as !readyForMerge for display

### Remove Harness/Model/Start configuration controls from Board card (moved to drawer) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Board cards no longer render Harness picker, Agent model picker, or Start button
  - [ ] Card hover/click reveals only the new card UI (verb badge, bead progress, agent meta)
  - [ ] All KanbanBoard.test.tsx tests that asserted Harness/Model/Start presence are removed or updated to assert absence

### Drop Board drag-to-phase wiring (explicitly out per PRD non-goal); keep drag-to-reorder within a column (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Dragging a card across columns is a no-op (drop is ignored)
  - [ ] Dragging a card within a single column reorders it within that column
  - [ ] No HTTP calls are made on cross-column drop (verified by network tab or test mock)
  - [ ] Any test asserting drag-to-phase mutation is removed

### Wire Board IssueCard → Issue Detail drawer (click opens drawer) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Single-click on a Board card opens the drawer for that issue
  - [ ] Bulk-action selection still works via the existing affordance (preserved gesture)
  - [ ] Closing the drawer leaves scroll/selection state intact on the Board

### Reframe Command Deck right pane as tabbed per-project lens (preserves all ZoneCOverviewTabs content components) (5/5 incomplete)
  - [ ] Right pane has a tab strip with Pipeline (new), Plans, Beads, Conversations, Activity, Settings
  - [ ] Pipeline tab renders a project-filtered subset of IssueRow primitives grouped by phase (composes f3 + f5)
  - [ ] Plans / Beads / Conversations / Activity / Settings tabs render the existing ZoneCOverviewTabs/* content components without edits to those files
  - [ ] Project tree (left pane) is unchanged in shape and behavior
  - [ ] Tab selection persists in localStorage scoped per-project

### Add Command Deck mini 5-tile metric strip in the feature header (2/2 incomplete)
  - [ ] 5-tile strip renders in feature header area scoped to selected project
  - [ ] Counts update reactively as store state changes

### Wire Command Deck IssueRow → drawer (preserves tree selection + conversation route) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Clicking a Pipeline-tab row opens the drawer; ?issue=<id> is appended to existing search params, not replaced
  - [ ] Tree selection (project tree) persists when drawer is open
  - [ ] Conversation route (/conv/<id>) persists when drawer is open; closing returns to the same conversation view

### Replace AgentList + GodView/AgentGrid with fleet grid composing AgentCard primitive (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] FleetAgentsView.tsx renders one AgentCard per running agent in the auto-fill grid layout
  - [ ] App.tsx /agents route renders FleetAgentsView (import swap from AgentList)
  - [ ] Stuck agents render with the destructive border override + STUCK · Nh verb badge
  - [ ] Card stream excerpt populates from existing live observation source (PAN-1052 feed) trimmed to most-recent N lines

### Wire Agents 6-tile metric strip (Running / Stuck / Cost 24h / Tokens 24h / Avg runtime / Queue) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] 6 tiles render in correct order with correct eyebrow icons and signal colors
  - [ ] Counts update reactively from existing agent + cost store selectors
  - [ ] Spend tile carries `title=` tooltip linking to /costs for canonical numbers (per PRD §7 risk row 6)

### Wire Agents filter row (phase pills, project dropdown, model dropdown) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Phase pills filter the fleet grid; multiple can be selected at once
  - [ ] Project / model dropdowns filter additively (AND across categories)
  - [ ] Filter state syncs to URL (?phase=, ?projects=, ?models=)

### Move Deacon status UI from Agents to Health page (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] HealthDashboard.tsx renders DeaconStatus prominently
  - [ ] AgentList.tsx no longer renders any Deacon-specific section
  - [ ] CloisterStatusBar (sidebar) and DeaconPauseToggle (sidebar footer) remain unchanged in shape and behavior

### Wire Agents card → drawer (opens drawer scrolled to Active Agent section) (2/2 incomplete)
  - [ ] AgentCard 'Open issue' link calls openIssue(issueId, 'overview') and the drawer opens
  - [ ] When opened from Agents, the drawer scrolls to the active-agent card section on first render

### Redirect /awaiting-merge → /pipeline?phase=ship (preserves bookmarks, legacy sub-views map to filters) (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Visiting /awaiting-merge results in URL replaced to /pipeline?phase=ship and Pipeline renders
  - [ ] Legacy ?subview=blocked maps to /pipeline?phase=ship&blocked
  - [ ] Legacy ?subview=no-pr maps to /pipeline?phase=ship&noPr
  - [ ] AwaitingMergePage.tsx component file is NOT deleted in this bead (deletion is r2)

### Delete AwaitingMergePage.tsx + Tab type entry + all inbound references (5/5 incomplete)
  - [ ] AwaitingMergePage.tsx file is deleted
  - [ ] 'awaiting-merge' is removed from Tab union in Header.tsx; TS typecheck still passes
  - [ ] TAB_PATHS and PATH_TO_TAB no longer contain awaiting-merge entries
  - [ ] grep -r AwaitingMergePage src/ returns zero results
  - [ ] selectAwaitingMerge / selectBlockedFromMerge / selectOpenMergeRequests selectors remain in store.ts (used by Pipeline filters)

### Reshuffle Sidebar Operations group (Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents) and remove Awaiting Merge entry (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Operations group order is Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents (and AutoPreso last in the group)
  - [ ] Awaiting Merge nav entry is removed
  - [ ] Pipeline nav item has title attribute 'Awaiting Merge → filter on Pipeline' (muscle-memory hint for one release)
  - [ ] Sidebar tests pass; collapsed-mode icons still render correctly

### Flip default route: / → Pipeline, /board → Board, sidebar logo click → Pipeline (5/5 incomplete)
  - [ ] Visiting / renders Pipeline (not Board)
  - [ ] Visiting /board renders Board
  - [ ] Sidebar logo click navigates to Pipeline (both collapsed and expanded modes)
  - [ ] getTabFromPath() returns 'pipeline' as default for unknown paths (was 'command-deck')
  - [ ] App.test.tsx covers path → tab resolution for /, /pipeline, /board

### Audit InspectorPanel feature parity against new drawer; produce written checklist (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] docs/design/inspector-parity-checklist.md exists and enumerates every InspectorPanel feature
  - [ ] Each feature is mapped to (a) drawer subsection, (b) other surface, or (c) explicit out-of-scope flag with rationale
  - [ ] Checklist also enumerates inspector/* sub-files (AgentInfoSection, ReviewPipelineSection, ContainerSection, ActionsSection, MergedSummaryCard, StatusHistory, TerminalTabs)
  - [ ] If any feature maps to (c) out-of-scope, the checklist records the user-visible justification

### Delete InspectorPanel + inspector/* + AgentList + GodView/AgentGrid (gated by i1 checklist) (5/5 incomplete)
  - [ ] InspectorPanel.tsx, InspectorPanel.test.tsx, and src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/inspector/ are deleted
  - [ ] AgentList.tsx and its test are deleted
  - [ ] GodView/AgentGrid.tsx is deleted; the rest of GodView/* is untouched
  - [ ] grep -r InspectorPanel src/ returns zero results; grep -r AgentList src/ returns zero
  - [ ] npm run typecheck and npm test pass after deletion

### Wire ⌘K command palette result click → drawer (replaces existing route navigation) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] ⌘K issue ID search result opens the drawer on click
  - [ ] ⌘K branch search result opens the drawer for the issue that owns the branch
  - [ ] ⌘K title fragment search result opens the drawer for the matched issue

### Add styleguide-conformance Playwright test (asserts shared primitive class signatures across surfaces) (5/5 incomplete)
  - [ ] tests/e2e/styleguide-conformance.spec.ts exists and runs in isolated browser context (no shared profile)
  - [ ] Test asserts [data-component="verb-badge"] presence on at least one element on each of Pipeline, Board, Command Deck, Agents
  - [ ] Test asserts the expected primary primitive per surface: issue-row (Pipeline + Command Deck), issue-card (Board), agent-card (Agents)
  - [ ] Test explicitly skips /god-view per PRD §3 non-goal
  - [ ] Test runs in the existing Playwright suite (npm test or equivalent)

## REQUIRED: Complete all acceptance criteria BEFORE resubmitting

1. Review the incomplete AC above
2. Implement the missing requirements and write tests
3. Update plan.vbrief.json subItem statuses to 'completed'
4. Commit and push ALL changes
5. ONLY THEN resubmit: pan review request PAN-1148 -m "Completed acceptance criteria"

Do NOT resubmit until all AC are completed.
